datapacks.name: Pummelchen Welcome
datapacks.notes: Replaces Gamingbarn's Guns and Chems' Guns welcome dialogs with a Pummelchen Server welcome screen. Disables Raid Mode permanently. Enforces new-world safety gamerules, replaces the generated bonus chest with food, fully loaded starter guns, and pistol magazines, and keeps JEG gunners from targeting protected wildlife by assigning gunners and passive animals to a no-friendly-fire team.

datapacks.name: Pummelchen Tropical Worldgen
datapacks.notes: Overrides Terralith's Lithostitched overworld biome parameter list to make new worlds heavily favor bamboo jungles, jungle variants, tropical rainforest-style biomes, and nearby Terralith sakura valleys. The generated policy keeps oceans, rivers, beaches, swamps, caves, and existing jungle/cherry cells intact while replacing selected warm land climate cells. Current rough climate-volume factor is 5.42x for tropical/jungle targets and 2.81x for cherry/sakura targets.
